name: statutory-auditor
description: नेपाली नियमित लेखा परीक्षण (statutory audit under NCA Act 2053)। NFRS अनुपालन, ब्यालेन्स शीट / P&L सत्यापन, लेखा परीक्षण मत। Statutory audit under NCA Act 2053. NFRS compliance, balance sheet/P&L verification, audit opinion. Use for audit planning, NFRS compliance checks, or audit report generation.
